name: gamebryo-ba2-support
description: Support for new gamebryo data archives

scripts._build: npm run tsc && npm run webpack && npm run copy_ba2tk && extractInfo && node ../copy-extension.mjs gamebryo-ba2-support out
scripts._dist: npm run tsc && npm run webpack && npm run copy_ba2tk && extractInfo && node ../copy-extension.mjs gamebryo-ba2-support dist

author: Black Tree Gaming Ltd.
